step_9_mirror_of_self.test: Each filing now speaks in the procedural dialect of its native forum (Uniform Rules at the High Court, POPIA Reg 5(1)(c) at the Information Regulator, SAICA Code §§100-290 at SAICA, LPC Rule 36 at the LPC, etc.) without disturbing the 9-section canonical structure. The footnote layer separates procedural citations from substantive evidence, allowing each forum to read the filing in its own legal language while seeing the same crystalline whole.
step_9_mirror_of_self.verdict: Cycle 9 stands. The case is now both mathematically lawful (Cycle 8) and forum-fluent (Cycle 9). Roughness has been restored without sacrificing Good Shape.

deltas_from_cycle8.Roughness: +0.050 (target weakness — restored without harming Good Shape)
deltas_from_cycle8.Not_Separateness: +0.030 (forum-specific citations connect to broader legal frameworks)

weakest_quality_for_cycle10.name: Contrast
weakest_quality_for_cycle10.rationale: After Cycles 4-9 of consolidation and refinement, the case may benefit from sharper visual and rhetorical contrast between the lawful conduct of the applicant (Daniel) and the unlawful conduct of the respondents — perhaps via a side-by-side conduct-comparison schedule (Annexure E) or visual evidence-on-evidence chart.
